# result_package_version { #cdmconnector.result_package_version }

```python
result_package_version(result)
```

Analyze package versions used in a SummarisedResult.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type             | Description   | Default    |
|--------|------------------|---------------|------------|
| result | SummarisedResult |               | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                     | Description                                        |
|--------|--------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
|        | dict\[str, list\[str\]\] | Mapping of package_name to list of versions found. |
